page.title: Organization Telemetry & Analytics
page.description: Configure telemetry settings for your entire organization. Telemetry is enabled by default to improve the platform, but users can opt-out individually unless you disable this option.

enableTelemetry.title: Enable Telemetry
enableTelemetry.description: Allow collection of anonymous usage data to improve the platform (enabled by default)

allowUserOptOut.title: Allow User Opt-Out
allowUserOptOut.description: Allow individual users to opt-out of telemetry collection

alerts.enabled: ✓ Telemetry enabled. All categories are enabled by default for new users, but they can opt-out individually if desired.
alerts.centralizedControl: Centralized control: Users cannot opt-out individually. Ensure compliance with local privacy regulations.

anonymization.title: Data Anonymization Level
anonymization.description: Choose how much data to anonymize before collection

collectItems.performance: • Performance metrics (page load times, API response times)
collectItems.usage: • Feature usage patterns (which features are used)

errors.loadTenantTelemetrySettings: Failed to load tenant telemetry settings

descriptions.outbound: Configure SMTP or API settings for sending emails from your application
descriptions.inbound: Configure email providers to receive and process emails as tickets

descriptions.smtp: Configure traditional SMTP email server settings
descriptions.resend: Configure Resend API for modern email delivery

fromAddress.label: From Address
fromAddress.help: Must be from a verified domain. Use the Domains tab to add custom domains.

microsoft365.description: Runs a live Graph check (including create+delete subscription) to diagnose mailbox, folder, and permission issues.

note.label: Note:
note.body: Diagnostics will create a temporary Microsoft Graph subscription and then delete it. If deletion fails, you may need to manually remove the subscription in Microsoft 365.

header.title: Inbound Ticket Defaults
header.description: Configure default values for tickets created from email processing

form.description: Configure the default values that will be applied to tickets created from email processing

empty.title: No ticket defaults configured
empty.description: Create your first configuration to define default values for email-generated tickets

items.providerReference: • Each email provider can reference one ticket defaults configuration
items.requiredValues: • When an email creates a ticket, these defaults provide required field values
items.systemCreator: • System-generated tickets will show "System" as the creator when entered_by is null
items.scenarios: • You can create different defaults for different email scenarios (support, billing, etc.)
